_description: XAS Surface Specification Architecture v0.1.2 - Lifecycle-Aware Schema

phase_1_prerequisite.name: Canonical Direction
phase_1_prerequisite.gate: Canonical purpose and dominant object defined

phase_3_blocking.name: PTC Canon Completion
phase_3_blocking.gate: All PTC Completion Checklist items passed

phase_4_blocking.name: DTC Execution Translation
phase_4_blocking.gate: All DTC Execution Packet sections complete

xas_authority_note: This specification is a structured draft generated by XAS. It is NOT execution-ready. PTC completion (Phase 3) and DTC translation (Phase 4) are MANDATORY before CC can execute.
implementation_note: CC implementation authority comes from: (1) PTC-completed spec (Phase 3), (2) DTC execution packet (Phase 4). Neither alone is sufficient.

_metadata.product: [Product Domain: SCOUT, Docente, MO-Base, VISTA, ATLAS, etc.]

sds_sequence.clarity_phase: Operator understands what they're looking at
sds_sequence.conviction_phase: Operator trusts the system and acts

canon_divergences: [List any intentional departures from canon, if any]

dominant_object.name: [Signal | LearningState | OntologyNode | DecisionPoint | etc.]
dominant_object.lifecycle_binding: [How object lifecycle maps to IMS states]

c0_human_principle.description: User is SUBJECT, System is INSTRUMENT
c0_human_principle.binding: [How is C0 enforced? Operator agency required?]

c1_ims.binding: [Which domain states map to which IMS states?]

c2_lpc.binding: [How does user's life path affect this surface?]

c5_snc.binding: [How is signal novelty detected and shown?]

ptc_completion_requirements: Canon bindings (SDS sequence, vocabulary, domain profile)
Trust model (confidence bands, FLAG-B01, ethics gates)
IMS state transition logic (6 states + guards + rollback)
Orbit bindings (for Stardance surfaces: state, frame, visual)
dtc_translation_requirements: IMS state machine implementation plan (how to code 6 states)
Confidence gate implementation plan (calculation, display, validation)
Preview generation (standalone HTML, all states, interactive)
Known gaps and deferred work (v1.1 features, pending dependencies)
Testing requirements (unit, integration, E2E test counts and coverage)
cc_execution_constraints: Use specified framework (React 18+ | Vue 3+ | vanilla HTML)
Use specified styling (Tailwind | CSS Modules | CSS)
Implement all 6 IMS states (idle, validating, processing, complete, partial_complete, failed)
Implement confidence calculation (0.0-1.0 scale, 0.92 hard cap)
Implement confidence gates (FLAG-B01, ethics, override logic)
Generate interactive preview (standalone HTML, no build required)
Achieve test coverage (minimum 80%, target 90%+, 100% on critical paths)
Enforce fail-closed security (gates block by default, no bypass logic)

uat_acceptance_criteria.30_second_insight_test: Does an operator understand this surface in 30 seconds?
uat_acceptance_criteria.primary_question: Does the surface answer its primary question?
uat_acceptance_criteria.domain_fit: Does this match the product domain?

uxc_certification_requirements: C0: Human Principle - User is subject, system is instrument
C1: IMS - All 6 states implemented and working
C2: LPC - Life path context integrated (if applicable)
C3: LIC - Learning context integrated (if applicable)
C5: SNC - Signal novelty detected and shown
C7: TIS - Trust and confidence gates enforced
C8: CQX - Context and query extension metadata present

surface_registry_metadata.known_gaps: [List of v1.0 limitations to be addressed in v1.1 or later]

orbit_binding.orbit_state_transitions: [How do IMS states affect orbit state?]

data_objects.name: [e.g., Signal]
data_objects.uxc_binding: [Which UXC layer does this belong to?]

decision_model.primary_hierarchy: [Level 1: What am I looking at? | Level 2: What does it mean? | Level 3: What should I do?]

integration_points.fallback_if_down: [What happens if this system is unavailable?]

validation_rules: No progress bars or workflow steps
All governed actions show confidence visibility
IMS state machine enforced (no invalid transitions)
Operator control preserved (human decides, not automation)
